title: Fix 6 high-severity and 13 moderate Dependabot CVEs
objective: Update all vulnerable dependencies to patched versions as identified by GitHub Dependabot. After this task, 'safety check -r requirements.txt' must return zero vulnerabilities.
context: GitHub reported 19 vulnerabilities on push to ihoward40/SintraPrime-Unified: 6 high, 13 moderate.
Dependency updates must not break existing tests.
After P0-002, safety check will fail the CI build — so this task is required before CI can go green.
Use 'pip-audit' or 'safety check' to enumerate all CVEs before patching.
Pin all updated dependencies to exact versions in requirements.txt.
Run the full phase18/ test suite after each batch of updates to catch regressions early.
acceptance_checks: All existing phase18/ tests pass (127/127 minimum)
No new ModuleNotFoundError or ImportError introduced
requirements.txt uses exact version pins (==) not ranges
